story.iWant: Swagger decorators applied to all controller endpoints
story.soThat: every API endpoint is properly documented with request/response schemas and authentication requirements
story.tasks:
- [ ] Task 1: Create custom decorator infrastructure (AC: 8.3.1) - [ ] Subtask 1.1: Create `src/common/decorators/api-endpoint.decorator.ts` - [ ] Subtask 1.2: Import required decorators from `@nestjs/swagger` - [ ] Subtask 1.3: Import factory functions from `@/common/swagger` - [ ] Subtask 1.4: Define `ApiEndpointOptions` interface - [ ] Subtask 1.5: Implement `ApiEndpoint()` decorator function - [ ] Subtask 1.6: Add conditional logic for `isPublic` option - [ ] Subtask 1.7: Add conditional logic for `isPaginated` option - [ ] Subtask 1.8: Use `applyDecorators()` to compose decorator array - [ ] Subtask 1.9: Add JSDoc documentation with usage examples
- [ ] Task 2: Create CRUD shortcut decorators (AC: 8.3.2) - [ ] Subtask 2.1: Create `src/common/decorators/api-crud.decorator.ts` - [ ] Subtask 2.2: Import `ApiEndpoint` and Swagger decorators - [ ] Subtask 2.3: Implement `@ApiGetAll(type)` decorator - [ ] Subtask 2.4: Implement `@ApiGetOne(type)` with `@ApiNotFoundResponse()` - [ ] Subtask 2.5: Implement `@ApiCreate(type)` with `@ApiCreatedResponse()` - [ ] Subtask 2.6: Implement `@ApiUpdate(type)` with `@ApiNotFoundResponse()` - [ ] Subtask 2.7: Implement `@ApiDelete()` with `@ApiNoContentResponse()` - [ ] Subtask 2.8: Add JSDoc documentation for each decorator
- [ ] Task 3: Update AuthController with Swagger decorators (AC: 8.3.3, 8.3.4, 8.3.5) - [ ] Subtask 3.1: Add `@ApiTags('Authentication')` to controller class - [ ] Subtask 3.2: Document `POST /auth/register` endpoint - [ ] Subtask 3.3: Document `POST /auth/login/admin` endpoint - [ ] Subtask 3.4: Document `POST /auth/login/otp/request` endpoint - [ ] Subtask 3.5: Document `POST /auth/login/otp/verify` endpoint - [ ] Subtask 3.6: Document `POST /auth/refresh` endpoint (mark as public) - [ ] Subtask 3.7: Document `POST /auth/logout` endpoint - [ ] Subtask 3.8: Document `POST /auth/forgot-password` endpoint (mark as public) - [ ] Subtask 3.9: Document `POST /auth/reset-password` endpoint (mark as public) - [ ] Subtask 3.10: Document `POST /auth/verify-phone` endpoint (mark as public) - [ ] Subtask 3.11: Document `POST /auth/resend-otp` endpoint (mark as public)
- [ ] Task 4: Update UsersController with Swagger decorators (AC: 8.3.3, 8.3.4, 8.3.5) - [ ] Subtask 4.1: Add `@ApiTags('Users')` to controller class - [ ] Subtask 4.2: Apply `@ApiGetAll(UserResDto)` to `GET /users` - [ ] Subtask 4.3: Add `@ApiQuery()` decorators for pagination params - [ ] Subtask 4.4: Apply `@ApiGetOne(UserResDto)` to `GET /users/:id` - [ ] Subtask 4.5: Add `@ApiParam()` decorator for `id` parameter - [ ] Subtask 4.6: Apply `@ApiCreate(UserResDto)` to `POST /users` - [ ] Subtask 4.7: Apply `@ApiUpdate(UserResDto)` to `PATCH /users/:id` - [ ] Subtask 4.8: Add `@ApiParam()` decorator for `id` parameter - [ ] Subtask 4.9: Apply `@ApiDelete()` to `DELETE /users/:id` - [ ] Subtask 4.10: Add `@ApiParam()` decorator for `id` parameter
- [ ] Task 5: Update ProfileController with Swagger decorators (AC: 8.3.3, 8.3.4) - [ ] Subtask 5.1: Add `@ApiTags('Profile')` to controller class - [ ] Subtask 5.2: Apply `@ApiGetOne(UserResDto)` to `GET /users/me` - [ ] Subtask 5.3: Apply `@ApiUpdate(UserResDto)` to `PATCH /users/me`
- [ ] Task 6: Update PermissionsController with Swagger decorators (AC: 8.3.3, 8.3.4, 8.3.5) - [ ] Subtask 6.1: Add `@ApiTags('Permissions')` to controller class - [ ] Subtask 6.2: Apply `@ApiGetAll(PermissionResDto)` to `GET /permissions` - [ ] Subtask 6.3: Document `GET /permissions/modules` endpoint - [ ] Subtask 6.4: Document `GET /permissions/users/:id/permissions` endpoint - [ ] Subtask 6.5: Document `POST /permissions/users/:id/permissions` endpoint - [ ] Subtask 6.6: Document `DELETE /permissions/users/:id/permissions` endpoint
- [ ] Task 7: Update FilesController with Swagger decorators (AC: 8.3.3, 8.3.4, 8.3.5) - [ ] Subtask 7.1: Add `@ApiTags('Files')` to controller class - [ ] Subtask 7.2: Document `POST /files/upload` endpoint with `@ApiConsumes('multipart/form-data')` - [ ] Subtask 7.3: Add `@ApiBody()` decorator for file upload specification - [ ] Subtask 7.4: Apply `@ApiGetAll(FileResDto)` to `GET /files` - [ ] Subtask 7.5: Apply `@ApiGetOne(FileResDto)` to `GET /files/:id` - [ ] Subtask 7.6: Document `GET /files/:id/download` endpoint - [ ] Subtask 7.7: Apply `@ApiDelete()` to `DELETE /files/:id`
- [ ] Task 8: Update Auth DTOs with `@ApiProperty()` decorators (AC: 8.3.6) - [ ] Subtask 8.1: Update `RegisterDto` with example values - [ ] Subtask 8.2: Update `LoginAdminDto` with example values - [ ] Subtask 8.3: Update auth response DTOs
- [ ] Task 9: Update User/Permission DTOs with `@ApiProperty()` decorators (AC: 8.3.6) - [ ] Subtask 9.1: Update `CreateUserDto` with example values - [ ] Subtask 9.2: Update `UpdateUserDto` with example values - [ ] Subtask 9.3: Update permission DTOs
- [ ] Task 10: Update File DTOs with `@ApiProperty()` decorators (AC: 8.3.6) - [ ] Subtask 10.1: Update file upload DTOs - [ ] Subtask 10.2: Add `@ApiProperty()` for file metadata fields
- [ ] Task 11: Verify Response DTOs (AC: 8.3.7) - [ ] Subtask 11.1: Verify `UserResDto` has correct decorators - [ ] Subtask 11.2: Verify `PermissionResDto` has correct decorators - [ ] Subtask 11.3: Verify `FileResDto` has correct decorators - [ ] Subtask 11.4: Check all sensitive fields have `@Exclude()` decorator
- [ ] Task 12: Export decorators from barrel file - [ ] Subtask 12.1: Update `src/common/decorators/index.ts` - [ ] Subtask 12.2: Export `ApiEndpoint` decorator - [ ] Subtask 12.3: Export all CRUD shortcut decorators
- [ ] Task 13: Manual Swagger UI validation (AC: 8.3.8) - [ ] Subtask 13.1: Start application in development mode - [ ] Subtask 13.2: Navigate to `http://localhost:3000/api/docs` - [ ] Subtask 13.3: Verify all controllers appear with correct tags - [ ] Subtask 13.4: Test "Try it out" functionality
- [ ] Task 14: Write unit tests for custom decorators - [ ] Subtask 14.1: Create test file for `@ApiEndpoint` decorator - [ ] Subtask 14.2: Test decorator composition - [ ] Subtask 14.3: Create test file for CRUD shortcuts - [ ] Subtask 14.4: Run tests and verify all pass

story-context.acceptanceCriteria:
1. **AC-8.3.1:** Custom `@ApiEndpoint` decorator created - File: `src/common/decorators/api-endpoint.decorator.ts` - Function signature: `ApiEndpoint(summary: string, options?: ApiEndpointOptions)` - Options interface includes: `type?`, `isPaginated?`, `isPublic?` - Automatically applies: `@ApiOperation`, `@ApiBadRequestResponse`, `@ApiBearerAuth`, `@ApiUnauthorizedResponse`, `@ApiOkResponse` - Uses `createApiResponseClass()` for single responses - Uses `createPaginatedApiResponseClass()` for paginated responses
2. **AC-8.3.2:** CRUD shortcut decorators created - File: `src/common/decorators/api-crud.decorator.ts` - Decorators: `@ApiGetAll`, `@ApiGetOne`, `@ApiCreate`, `@ApiUpdate`, `@ApiDelete` - Each shortcut wraps `@ApiEndpoint` with appropriate settings
3. **AC-8.3.3:** All controllers have `@ApiTags()` decorator - AuthController - Tag: "Authentication" - UsersController - Tag: "Users" - ProfileController - Tag: "Profile" - PermissionsController - Tag: "Permissions" - FilesController - Tag: "Files"
4. **AC-8.3.4:** All controller methods have endpoint documentation - CRUD shortcuts or custom `@ApiEndpoint()` for all methods - Summary text in Turkish - Response DTO types specified - Public endpoints marked with `isPublic: true`
5. **AC-8.3.5:** Path and query parameters documented - `@ApiParam()` for all path parameters - `@ApiQuery()` for query parameters - Descriptions in Turkish
6. **AC-8.3.6:** Request DTOs have `@ApiProperty()` decorators - All request DTOs updated - Example values provided - Enum values documented
7. **AC-8.3.7:** Response DTOs verified for Swagger metadata - All response DTOs checked for `@Expose()` decorators - Sensitive fields marked with `@Exclude()`
8. **AC-8.3.8:** Swagger UI validation complete - All controllers visible at `/api/docs` - All endpoints listed with summaries - "Try it out" functionality works

doc.title: Epic 8 Technical Specification - API Documentation (Swagger)
doc.section: APIs and Interfaces - Custom Decorator Interfaces
doc.snippet: Defines ApiEndpoint decorator interface with type, isPaginated, and isPublic options. Automatically applies ApiOperation, response schemas, and authentication decorators. CRUD shortcuts wrap ApiEndpoint for common operations.

doc.title: Epic 8 Technical Specification
doc.section: Data Models and Contracts - Response Wrapper Classes
doc.snippet: Factory functions create runtime response classes: createApiResponseClass() for single items, createPaginatedApiResponseClass() for arrays with count. ErrorApiResponseClass for errors.

doc.title: Epic 8 Technical Specification
doc.snippet: Implementation workflow: 1) Create api-endpoint.decorator.ts with ApiEndpoint() 2) Create api-crud.decorator.ts with shortcuts 3) Apply decorators to all controllers (Auth, Users, Profile, Permissions, Files) 4) Add @ApiProperty to DTOs 5) Verify Swagger UI

doc.title: Epic 8: API Documentation (Swagger)
doc.snippet: As a developer, I want controller endpoints with Swagger decorators, so that every endpoint is documented. Acceptance: @ApiTags on controllers, @ApiOperation on methods, @ApiProperty on DTOs, example values in Swagger UI.

doc.title: API Contracts
doc.snippet: Success response: {success: true, status: 200|201, data: T|T[], count?: number, message: string}. Error response: {success: false, status: 4xx|5xx, message: string, errors?: Array}. HTTP status codes: 200 OK, 201 Created, 400 Bad Request, 401 Unauthorized, 403 Forbidden, 404 Not Found.

doc.title: Implementation Patterns
doc.snippet: Controllers return DTOs directly. Interceptor auto-wraps in {success, status, data, message} format. Paginated responses return {data, count} and interceptor adds success/status/message. Factory classes must match this format.

doc.title: Implementation Patterns
doc.snippet: Controller pattern: @ApiTags at class level, @Controller with path, @ApiBearerAuth for auth, @UseGuards for JWT/permissions, methods use @ApiOperation and response decorators, return DTOs directly (interceptor wraps).

doc.title: Testing Strategy
doc.snippet: Unit testing pattern: Arrange-Act-Assert. Test decorator composition, verify correct decorators applied, check isPublic/isPaginated options. Coverage target: 90% for custom decorators.

doc.title: Story 8.2 - Swagger Response Factory Functions
doc.snippet: Factory functions implemented and tested. createApiResponseClass() and createPaginatedApiResponseClass() available at src/common/swagger/api-response.factory.ts. ErrorApiResponseClass for error responses. All exported from src/common/swagger/index.ts. 21 unit tests passing.

doc.title: Story 8.1 - Swagger Module Setup
doc.snippet: Swagger UI operational at /api/docs with environment control. DocumentBuilder configured with Bearer JWT authentication. Plugin enabled in nest-cli.json for compile-time metadata extraction. All prerequisites for decorator application ready.

artifact.reason: Factory function to create runtime response classes for Swagger. Use this in @ApiEndpoint decorator to generate type-safe response schemas. Returns class with success, status, data, message properties.
Factory function for paginated response classes. Use in @ApiEndpoint with isPaginated: true option. Returns class with success, status, data[], count, message properties.
Standard error response class for Swagger. Use in @ApiBadRequestResponse and other error decorators. Properties: success: false, status, message, errors?
Barrel export for Swagger utilities. Import factory functions from this path: import { createApiResponseClass, ErrorApiResponseClass } from '@/common/swagger'

Authentication controller with 10 route methods. Needs @ApiTags('Authentication'), @ApiOperation on each method, @ApiBody for request DTOs, @ApiResponse for responses. Public endpoints: register, refresh, forgotPassword, resetPassword, verifyPhone, resendOtp.
Users CRUD controller with 5 methods. Needs @ApiTags('Users'), CRUD shortcuts (@ApiGetAll, @ApiGetOne, @ApiCreate, @ApiUpdate, @ApiDelete), @ApiQuery for pagination, @ApiParam for :id parameter.
Profile self-service controller with getProfile and updateProfile methods. Needs @ApiTags('Profile'), @ApiGetOne for GET, @ApiUpdate for PATCH.

Permissions controller with 5 methods. Needs @ApiTags('Permissions'), custom @ApiEndpoint decorators for specialized operations (getAllPermissions, getPermissionModules, getUserPermissions, assignPermissions, revokePermissions).

File management controller with upload, list, get, download, delete methods. Needs @ApiTags('Files'), @ApiConsumes('multipart/form-data') for upload, @ApiBody with file schema, CRUD shortcuts for other methods.
Decorators barrel export. Add new exports for ApiEndpoint and CRUD shortcuts here. Current exports: @Permission, @CurrentUser, @Public, @ApiPaginatedResponse.
Marks endpoints as public (no JWT required). Use this to identify which endpoints should have isPublic: true in @ApiEndpoint options.
Existing Swagger decorator for paginated responses. Similar pattern to CRUD shortcuts - composes multiple Swagger decorators. Use as reference for implementing @ApiEndpoint and CRUD decorators.

User response DTO. Already has @Expose decorators. Verify @ApiProperty decorators are present. Properties: id, phoneNumber, firstName, lastName, email, role, isActive, phoneVerified, createdAt, updatedAt.
File response DTO. Uses @Expose and @Transform decorators. Verify @ApiProperty decorators. Properties: id, filename, originalName, mimeType, size, sizeFormatted, createdAt.
Registration request DTO. Add @ApiProperty with example values. Properties: phoneNumber, firstName, lastName, role, password?, email?.

Swagger configuration in main.ts. DocumentBuilder with Bearer JWT auth configured. Swagger UI at /api/docs. Environment-controlled with SWAGGER_ENABLED. Reference for understanding Bearer auth setup (JWT-auth scheme name).

node.reason: Core Swagger/OpenAPI integration for NestJS. Provides all decorator functions: ApiOperation, ApiResponse, ApiTags, ApiParam, ApiQuery, ApiProperty, etc.

dependencies.reason: NestJS core decorators. Provides applyDecorators() for decorator composition, Type helper for generic types, and all HTTP method decorators.

node.reason: DTO transformation with @Expose and @Exclude decorators. Already used in response DTOs for field filtering.
Validation decorators. Swagger plugin auto-infers types from these decorators (@IsString, @IsNumber, etc.).

story-context.constraints:
**Decorator Composition:** - Use `applyDecorators()` from @nestjs/common to combine multiple decorators into single function - Return type must be MethodDecorator for controller method decorators - Order matters for metadata registration - apply decorators in logical sequence
**Turkish Communication Language:** - All endpoint summaries in Turkish (configured in bmad/bmm/config.yaml: communication_language: Turkish) - Parameter descriptions in Turkish - Example values can be in English (technical context)
**Response Format Alignment:** - Factory classes MUST match LoggingInterceptor structure - Success: {success: true, status: 200|201, data: T, message: string} - Paginated: {success: true, status: 200, data: T[], count: number, message: string} - Error: {success: false, status: 4xx|5xx, message: string, errors?: string[]}
**Import Path Standards:** - Use @/common/swagger for factory functions (path alias configured) - Use @/common/decorators for custom decorators - Follow 8-group import organization: Libraries, DTOs, Services, Repositories, Entities, Interfaces, Enums, Events
**Swagger Plugin Configuration:** - Plugin enabled in nest-cli.json with classValidatorShim: true - Auto-infers types from class-validator decorators - Explicit @ApiProperty still needed for example values and descriptions - Plugin works on DTOs but decorators must be manually applied to controllers
**File Organization:** - Custom decorators in src/common/decorators/ - Test files in __tests__/ subdirectory - Barrel exports in index.ts for clean imports - Swagger utilities in src/common/swagger/
**Testing Requirements:** - Unit tests for decorator composition (90% coverage target) - Verify correct decorators applied in different scenarios - Test isPublic and isPaginated options - Manual Swagger UI validation critical for integration verification

tests.standards:
**Unit Testing (Primary for Decorators):** - Framework: Jest (already configured in project) - Pattern: Arrange-Act-Assert - Coverage Target: 90% for custom decorator logic - Test Files: - src/common/decorators/__tests__/api-endpoint.decorator.spec.ts - src/common/decorators/__tests__/api-crud.decorator.spec.ts - Test Cases: - Verify @ApiEndpoint applies all required decorators - Test isPublic: true excludes auth decorators - Test isPaginated: true uses paginated response class - Verify CRUD shortcuts apply correct decorator composition - Test return types are valid MethodDecorators
**Manual Swagger UI Testing (Critical):** - Environment: Development with SWAGGER_ENABLED=true - URL: http://localhost:3000/api/docs - Validation Checklist: - All 5-6 controllers visible with correct tags - All endpoints listed under correct controller - Summaries in Turkish - Request schemas show all fields with examples - Response schemas match DTO structure - Paginated responses show count property - Error responses documented (400, 401, 403, 404) - "Authorize" button functional - JWT token input works - "Try it out" executes requests successfully
**Integration Testing (E2E):** - Test OpenAPI JSON export at /api/docs-json - Validate document structure and completeness - Verify all paths and operations present - Check security requirements documented
tests.locations: - Unit tests: src/common/decorators/__tests__/*.spec.ts - E2E tests: test/swagger.e2e-spec.ts (create new file) - Test utilities: test/factories/ (for mock data)
tests.ideas:
**Test Ideas Mapped to Acceptance Criteria:**
AC-8.3.1 (ApiEndpoint Decorator): - Test that ApiEndpoint with no options applies operation + bad request response - Test that ApiEndpoint with type applies Ok response with correct class - Test that isPublic: true skips ApiBearerAuth and ApiUnauthorizedResponse - Test that isPaginated: true uses createPaginatedApiResponseClass - Test that isPublic: false (default) includes auth decorators
AC-8.3.2 (CRUD Shortcuts): - Test ApiGetAll applies paginated response and correct summary - Test ApiGetOne applies NotFoundResponse - Test ApiCreate applies CreatedResponse with 201 status - Test ApiUpdate applies NotFoundResponse - Test ApiDelete applies NoContentResponse and NotFoundResponse
AC-8.3.8 (Swagger UI Integration): - Test /api/docs returns 200 when SWAGGER_ENABLED=true - Test /api/docs-json exports valid OpenAPI 3.0 document - Test all controller tags present in document - Test authentication requirements documented - Test request/response schemas complete
